Title: Fleet Management
Description: Learn how to build and manage a fleet of ships to expand your operations.

Steps.Title: Introduction to Fleets
Steps.Message: As you grow more powerful, you'll want to command multiple ships. Fleet management allows you to control a small armada!

Steps.Title: Building Your Fleet
Steps.Message:
To create a fleet:
• Build or acquire additional ships
• Assign captains to ships (requires crew quarters)
• Group ships into a fleet formation
• Designate a flagship (usually your strongest ship)
• Set fleet orders and tactics

Steps.Title: Crew System
Steps.Message:
Each ship in your fleet needs crew:
• Hire crew at stations (Engineers, Pilots, Gunners, etc.)
• Pay regular salaries from your credits
• Crew skills improve over time
• Crew quarters required on ship for crew capacity
• Better crew = better ship performance

Steps.Title: Captain Commands
Steps.Message:
Captains can execute various commands:
• MINE - Autonomous mining operations
• TRADE - Automated trading routes
• PATROL - Defend a sector
• ESCORT - Protect your flagship
• ATTACK - Engage hostile targets
• SALVAGE - Collect wreckage and debris

Steps.Title: Fleet Formations
Steps.Message:
Fleet formations provide tactical advantages:
• WEDGE - Offensive formation
• LINE - Defensive formation
• CIRCLE - Protect a central ship
• SCATTERED - Maximize coverage

Formations affect combat effectiveness and movement speed.

Steps.Title: Fleet Strategy
Steps.Message:
Effective fleet management:
• Specialize ships (miners, fighters, traders)
• Balance fleet composition
• Manage crew wages to avoid bankruptcy
• Upgrade flagship first for best ROI
• Use AI captains to automate routine tasks
• Keep fleet together for mutual support

Steps.Title: Fleet Management Complete!
Steps.Message: You now understand fleet management! Build your armada and dominate the galaxy!
